nau7802_is_available.tooltip: Check if NAU7802 has new data available

nau7802_get_average.tooltip: Get average raw reading over specified number of samples

nau7802_tare.tooltip: Set current reading as zero point (tare), call with empty scale

nau7802_calibrate.tooltip: Calculate calibration factor using known weight (grams)

nau7802_set_cal_factor.tooltip: Directly set calibration factor (use when restoring saved calibration)

nau7802_get_cal_factor.tooltip: Read current calibration factor (save for future use)
